title: Termination of the Application of Wet Signatures on Electronic A.TR Circulation Documents
bodyHtml:
As a result of the negotiations with the European Commission, an agreement has been reached to terminate the application of wet signatures on electronically issued A.TR Circulation Documents as of July 8, 2024. The customs visa box of the A.TR Circulation Document issued electronically via MEDOS will no longer be signed by the relevant customs officers as of July 8, 2024.

Click here for the letter from the Directorate General of Customs regarding the matter.
Click here for the EU Commission notice.
